features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack

Soft & Gentle Hyaluronic Care, our new dermatologically approved SKIN EXPERT range, combining advanced 72h sweat & odour protection with hero skincare ingredient Hyaluronic Acid, for superior care & protection for your underarms.
Choose Rosewater Dew for a modern floral fragrance with a delicate blend of rose, hibiscus and pomegranate for a petal-perfect scent that lasts all day.

Our ground breaking innovation combines iconic skincare ingredient, Hyaluronic Acid with our most advanced anti-perspirant technology. For sweat & odour protection you can trust, whilst providing superior care to your underarms. Leaving your skin feeling softer, smoother & hydrated.

What is Hyaluronic Acid? Hyaluronic Acid is a key skin care ingredient, which retains moisture and can bind to over a thousand times its weight in water. It helps promote skin cell regeneration, hydrate, soften & smooth the skin.

72h sweat & odour protection: Soft & Gentle Skin Expert Hyaluronic Care range has our most advanced protection, containing 50% more anti-sweat actives vs our 48h range, for 72h protection against sweat & odour. So you don’t have to compromise between stopping sweat & caring for your skin.
description: Ingredients Butane, Isobutane, Propane, Aluminum Chlorohydrate, Isopropyl Myristate, Isopropyl Palmitate, C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate, Sodium Hyaluronate, Parfum, Disteardimonium Hectorite, Propylene Carbonate, Allantoin, Hydrogenated SOYBEAN Oil, Ricinus Communis Seed Oil, Sorbitan Olivate, Caproic Acid, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, Citronellol, Dimethyl Phenethyl Acetate, Geraniol, Terpineol, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Lavandula Oil/Extract, Rose Ketones Directions Apply to both right and left underarm. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes See more
